entities.select: id, entity_type, source_record_id, created_at, entity_versions!inner(id, data, is_current, version_number)

props.className: px-4 py-2 rounded-md bg-muted/50 border text-sm font-medium

props.children: {{params.entityType === 'invoice' ? entity.entity_versions[0].data.invoice_number || entity.entity_versions[0].data.document_number || entity.entity_versions[0].data.name || 'Invoice' : params.entityType === 'asset' ? entity.entity_versions[0].data.identifier || entity.entity_versions[0].data.name || 'Unnamed' : entity.entity_versions[0].data.name || entity.source_record_id || 'Unnamed'}}

Customer: {{lookupEntityFieldById(data.invoiceCustomers, entity.entity_versions[0].data.customer_id, 'name')}} · Billing Account: {{lookupEntityFieldById(data.invoiceBillingAccounts, entity.entity_versions[0].data.billing_account_id, 'name', 'account_number')}} · Contract: {{lookupEntityFieldById(data.invoiceContracts, entity.entity_versions[0].data.contract_id, 'contract_number', 'name')}} · Job Site: {{lookupEntityFieldById(data.invoiceJobSites, entity.entity_versions[0].data.job_site_id, 'name')}} · Exception: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.billing_exception_reason || 'none'}}

Origin: {{lookupEntityFieldById(data.transferBranches, entity.entity_versions[0].data.origin_branch_id || entity.entity_versions[0].data.from_branch_id, 'name') || entity.entity_versions[0].data.origin_branch_id || entity.entity_versions[0].data.from_branch_id || 'N/A'}} · Destination: {{lookupEntityFieldById(data.transferBranches, entity.entity_versions[0].data.destination_branch_id || entity.entity_versions[0].data.to_branch_id, 'name') || entity.entity_versions[0].data.destination_branch_id || entity.entity_versions[0].data.to_branch_id || 'N/A'}} · Scope: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.asset_scope || entity.entity_versions[0].data.asset_id || 'N/A'}} · Internal Cost: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.internal_cost || 'N/A'}}

Requested Ship: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.requested_ship_date || 'N/A'}} · Expected Receive: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.expected_receive_date || 'N/A'}} · Sourcing Decision: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.sourcing_decision_id || 'manual'}} · Exception: {{entity.entity_versions[0].data.transfer_exception_reason || 'none'}}

props.title: Checkout blocked: on transfer
props.description: This asset is currently in transfer and unavailable for assignment.

props.title: Checkout blocked: in maintenance
props.description: This asset is in maintenance and cannot be dispatched.

props.title: Checkout blocked: inspection hold
props.description: This asset failed inspection and must clear hold before rental.

props.title: Checkout blocked: retired
props.description: This asset is retired from rental operations.

props.title: Checkout blocked: lost
props.description: This asset is marked lost and unavailable for assignment.

props.title: Checkout blocked: conflicting assignment
props.description: This asset already has a conflicting rental assignment.

props.title: No {{params.entityLabelPluralLower}} yet
props.hint: Create your first {{params.entityLabelSingularLower}} to get started.

children.if: {{params.entityType !== 'customer' && params.entityType !== 'billing_account' && params.entityType !== 'contact' && params.entityType !== 'job_site' && params.entityType !== 'asset_category' && params.entityType !== 'asset' && params.entityType !== 'stock_item'}}

props.label: Description
props.placeholder: Optional description of this stock item
props.name: stockItemDescription
